historical_interval_method: case-scale residual simulation of cumulative paths
specification_note: AutoARIMAX order was selected by AIC using auto_arima with max_d=1; the retained model selected d=0, includes a linear trend term, and uses one-year outbreak indicators rather than post-outbreak level shifts.
validation_note: Out-of-sample validation is limited by reliance on a single held-out 2026 observation; rolling one-year-ahead calibration for 2016-2025 partly supplements this, but leave-one-out cross-validation or additional hold-out exercises for outbreak years such as 2019 and 2025 would provide broader evidence of model performance.
ljung_box_result: no residual autocorrelation detected at alpha=0.05
